title: Delegation of Commissioner's powers, duties, and functions - Canada.ca
content:
## Delegation of powers, duties, and functions of the Commissioner of Revenue
The following Acts administered by the Canada Revenue Agency contain provisions vesting powers in the Commissioner of Revenue. The Commissioner may delegate these powers to designated officials.
These officials are authorized to exercise powers or perform duties and functions of the Commissioner of Revenue through administrative delegation instruments signed by the Commissioner.
The following pages contain electronic copies of current delegations. These have been prepared as a convenient reference only. They have no official sanction.
Excise Tax Act (Part I)
Corporations Tax Act (Ontario)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
